creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199427
libucl 0.8.1 update patch

- Updates to last version: 0.8.1. Changelog: https://github.com/vstakhov/libucl/releases

- Reorder variables consistently with the porter's handbook variables order.

I have tested successfully with portlint and poudriere (11.2-RELEASE i386/amd64).
